name: Cartrus Gavinius
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male wearing a complete set of iron armor, including boots, cuirass, gauntlets, greaves, and helmet.

Race: Imperial

Personality Keywords: dutiful, service-oriented

Role: Healer and member of the Fighters Guild.

Home Location Information: Formerly associated with the Fighters Guild. Last known assignment placed him at Forsaken Mine.

Equipment and Abilities: Equipped with full iron armor. Served the Fighters Guild in a healing capacity.

Personality – Guild Healer: Cartrus Gavinius served as a healer within a Fighters Guild expedition assigned to clear Forsaken Mine of trolls. His role placed him alongside other guild members on the mission, including Viranus Donton. His presence indicates participation in the group’s support and recovery efforts during the assignment.

Fate: Cartrus Gavinius was found dead in the first chamber of Forsaken Mine, lying in a pool of blood. No clear cause of death was evident at the scene, and the only creatures present in the area were minor animals. His body was discovered after other fallen guild members were found deeper within the mine.
author: Bethesda
